title: The 𝓯𝓪𝓷𝓬𝔂 wonderland.zip
body:
this resourcepack makes the entities of wonderland.jar 𝓯𝓪𝓷𝓬𝔂.
idrk how this idea occured, but it's funny and cool!

that's it. yeah

oh and another that adds music to the torture room

please also play the original mod: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wonderland-jar
also on Modrinth: https://modrinth.com/mod/wonderland-jar

credits:
me- made the textures and the music
[alexander.25.k](https://www.curseforge.com/members/alexander_25) - made the entire mod (thank you for making my renders into stickers!!!)

here's the others (i just copied it from the curseforge page lol)

[JDG](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://modrinth.com/user/JDG) - most of the old textures resourcepack

[Stereotypical](https://www.youtube.com/@StereotypicalMC) - inspiration and ambient sound for one of the dimensions

[FIN Daries](https://www.youtube.com/@findaries8589) - inspiration

[Riverrflower](https://www.curseforge.com/members/riverrflower/projects) - design and idea for some entities

[Mr. Gibbo](https://www.curseforge.com/members/mrgibbo/projects) - chase sound for "The Entity" and jumpscare sound for "The Fate"

[Tavrix](https://www.curseforge.com/members/neodream_studios/projects) - music for "Torture" dimension (the original one, i just replaced it)

[0ckovl34re](https://www.youtube.com/@0ckovl34re) - some parts of lore & some structures & playtesting

[Dornan](https://www.youtube.com/@dornan3754) - idea of "Brickways" dimension and "The Eyeless" entity

[Nooby The Great](https://www.youtube.com/@Nooby_The_Great) - idea of "Maze" dimension and "TheSpawn" entity

[Mazellmi](https://www.youtube.com/@mazellmi) and [Clorobored](https://www.curseforge.com/members/clorobored/projects) - sounds for "TheSpawn" entity

You can also join [wonderland.hub](https://discord.gg/pmfPZzkQ) or [DualFusion Studios Discord](https://discord.gg/CQ4D9dwj) server where you can talk to me and some other mod developers aswell as get sneak peeks and announcements about the mod

Finally, it got approved on curseforge!
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/the-fancy-wonderland-zip
